summary: Soundboard fragment with noticeable tape problems but showcases an explosive, standout Good Lovin' jam.
review: The recording captures a brief slice of the show that includes what many consider one of the best Dead jams ever – a searing Good Lovin'. While the performance is praised for its improvisational fire, reviewers note non‑minor tape issues that affect clarity. The fragment leaves listeners wanting the rest of the concert.

ai_rating.rationale: Show is rated very highly for an exceptional Good Lovin' performance, but recording suffers from tape problems; limited number of reviews reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tape problems described as ‘not‑so‑minor’; some mistakes and occasional dropouts affect clarity despite overall listenability.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only a fragment is available; reviewers focus on the Good Lovin' jam and note the absence of the rest of the show.
